templates.name: Docs-only rules
templates.description: Approval mode for write tools, no merged-PR gate, no test gate. Built for docs sprints where Markdown changes don't need code-level checks but still want every state change reviewed.

templates.name: Refactor-only rules
templates.description: Locks the bridge into approval-only mode and requires a green WorkProof before done. Designed for refactor sprints where the agent is rewriting existing code, not adding features.

templates.name: Senior reviewer rules
templates.description: Approval-required for every write tool, requires a work summary AND a green WorkProof before a ticket can be marked done. The defaults a senior reviewer would set up for a new team.

templates.name: Test-first rules
templates.description: Pulse recipe that nightly highlights tickets recently moved to in_progress without a work summary that mentions tests. Pairs naturally with require-green-WorkProof.
